ground.schema:
Node properties:
- **Question**
  - `favorites`: INTEGER Example: "0"
  - `answered`: BOOLEAN 
  - `text`: STRING Example: "### This is:  Bug    ### Specifications  OS: Win10"
  - `link`: STRING Example: "https://stackoverflow.com/questions/62224586/playg"
  - `createdAt`: DATE_TIME Min: 2020-06-05T16:57:19Z, Max: 2020-06-05T21:49:16Z
  - `title`: STRING Example: "Playground is not loading with apollo-server-lambd"
  - `id`: INTEGER Min: 62220505, Max: 62224586
  - `upVotes`: INTEGER Example: "0"
  - `score`: INTEGER Example: "-1"
  - `downVotes`: INTEGER Example: "1"
- **Tag**
  - `name`: STRING Example: "aws-lambda"
- **User**
  - `image`: STRING Example: "https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-NcFYSuXU0nk/AAA"
  - `link`: STRING Example: "https://stackoverflow.com/users/10251021/alexandre"
  - `id`: INTEGER Min: 751, Max: 13681006
  - `reputation`: INTEGER Min: 1, Max: 420137
  - `display_name`: STRING Example: "Alexandre Le"
Relationship properties:

The relationships:
(:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(:Tag)
(:User)-[:ASKED]->(:Question)
ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (q:Question {id: 62224586})-[r1:TAGGED]->(t1:Tag {name: 'aws-lambda'}),
    p2 = (q)-[r2:ASKED]->(u1:User {reputation: 1000}),
    p3 = (u1)-[r3:ASKED]->(q2:Question {title: "Playground is not loading"})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How has Alexandre Le’s reputation as a Stack Overflow contributor influenced their engagement with AWS Lambda-related questions, particularly their recent issue about a playground not loading in Apollo Server on Lambda?

cypher: MATCH (u:User {display_name: "Alexandre Le"})-[:ASKED]->(q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: "aws-lambda"})\nWHERE q.title CONTAINS "playground not loading with apollo-server-lambd"\nRETURN u.reputation, q.createdAt, q.link
